think one thing that has worked really well with some of our customers is once we gain a deeper understanding of, kind of, your audience and the content that's starting to work organically and through AI, then we can start to match conversions in terms of next best step.

Really early on.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off strategy sprint and gather key insights for GrowthX's engagement with HockeyStack](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HockeyStack seeks to scale content production, improve distribution, and boost AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Current marketing focuses on LinkedIn, word-of-mouth, and outbound (10k calls/day via Thundersory)](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Key goals: 90% traffic increase in 90 days, more pipeline, top 10 keyword rankings in LLM search](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Existing content assets (research reports, template library) to be leveraged for higher traffic/conversion](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Challenges

  - [Content production not the main issue; distribution and driving traffic are key priorities](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Existing content breadth is strong, but needs better distribution strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Time/capacity constraints limit marketing team's ability to execute](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Recent dip in website landing page conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [Research reports and template library performing well](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [LinkedIn content driving engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
  - [Video content (e.g., "Can You Dashboard It?" series) shows promise](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2268.0)
  - [Case studies, especially when shared by sales team, are effective](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Opportunity to break down dense research reports into more digestible, targeted content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Visible, Bizible, 6sense, Demandbase, Common Room](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [HockeyStack positioning as a premium solution due to superior product](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Key differentiator: Built as a data platform from the ground up vs. competitors using white-labeled tools](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

### Target Audience & ICP

  - [B2B software companies, 50-10,000 employees (focus on 200-2,000+)](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [70% North America, 30% EMEA (UK third-largest market)](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Key titles: CMOs, CROs, VP Marketing, Growth Marketing, Performance Marketing, Marketing Ops](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

### Product & Value Proposition

  - [Core offering: Marketing attribution + newer Account Intelligence product](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Key value props: Visibility into full customer journey, data-driven decision making, AI-powered insights (Odin agent)](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Unique selling point: Built-in data foundation for high-performing go-to-market teams](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

### AI & LLM Strategy

  - [Aim to improve visibility and rankings in AI-driven search results](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail, niche keywords related to core offerings](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
  - [Opportunity to repurpose existing content for AI-friendly formats](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [HockeyStack to share additional materials (brand guidelines, competitor analysis, pain point docs)](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Schedule deep-dive sessions on specific topics/products](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin developing content strategy focusing on distribution and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Explore ways to break down existing research reports into more targeted, digestible content](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)
  - [Implement tracking for content performance by persona and topic to inform future strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)
  - [Begin mapping customer journey and aligning content/CTAs to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/ddWafYLC8einN2yzd3-mHpF-e82yYVLG?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)

action_items.description: Send comprehensive list of marketing materials to GrowthX team (competitor analysis, sales collateral, call recordings, brand guidelines, pain point docs)
Share video content series details (Can You Dashboard It?, AI agent series) with GrowthX for potential integration
Prepare strategy for repurposing HockeyStack's video content into shorts and high-intent question-aligned videos
Set up tools to track weekly progress (connect Search Console, Google Analytics, internal LLM visibility tool)
Schedule deep dive meetings with HockeyStack team for further context on specific areas (products, customers, content)
